zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Dutton於大約1357年出生在英國爾達頓時，她的父親Geoffery Dutton40歲，母親Ellen de Thornton42歲。她於大約1386年與Richard Aston結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年在英國斯塔福爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Dutton于大约1357年出生在英国爾達頓时，她的父亲Geoffery Dutton40岁，母亲Ellen de Thornton42岁。她于大约1386年与Richard Aston结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年在英国斯塔福爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Dutton was born about 1357, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, her father, Geoffery Dutton, was 40 and her mother, Ellen de Thornton, was 42. She married Richard Aston about 1386. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1420, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Dutton est née environ 1357, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffery Dutton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ellen de Thornton, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Aston environ 1386. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Dutton um 1357 in Dutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffery Dutton 40 und ihre Mutter Ellen de Thornton 42. Sie hat um 1386 Richard Aston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Dutton è nata il circa 1357 nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Geoffery Dutton, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Ellen de Thornton, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Richard Aston circa 1386. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1420, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Dutton(이)가 대략 1357년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffery Dutton(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen de Thornton(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1386년 Richard Aston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Dutton nasceu aproximadamente 1357, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffery Dutton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ellen de Thornton, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Aston aproximadamente 1386. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Dutton родилась около 1357 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffery Dutton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen de Thornton, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Aston около 1386 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Dutton nació aproximadamente 1357, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffery Dutton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ellen de Thornton, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Richard Aston aproximadamente 1386. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1420, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
